exploration_notes: The query flow traces as follows: (1) HTTP handler: `pkg/api/ds_query.go` — `QueryMetricsV2` receives POST /ds/query, binds the MetricRequest DTO, and calls `queryDataService.QueryData`. (2) Query service: `pkg/services/query/query.go` — `ServiceImpl.queryData` parses the metric request, routes to `handleQuerySingleDatasource` (or expressions/concurrent), which builds a `backend.QueryDataRequest` and calls `s.pluginClient.QueryData`. (3) Plugin client interface: `pkg/plugins/ifaces.go` defines `
